summary: Verstappen hunts his fourth consecutive victory as McLaren's resurgent pace threatens to crack Red Bull's dominance at a circuit that punishes setup mistakes. Norris and Piastri circle closer to the championship lead, with tire strategy and Hungary's notoriously tight pit window offering opportunities for tactical breakthroughs. A McLaren win would reshape the constructors' battle and signal whether Red Bull's early-season momentum has genuinely stalled or merely stuttered.
